creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
None of your rules keep state. Your panic in FreeBSD 8.1 is different from the state panic I have/had under FreeBSD 12. The offending code doesn't exist in ip_nat.c in ipfilter 5.1.2. Much of that code has been rewritten.

It's suggested you try this under FreeBSD 10, 11, or 12. FreeBSD 11 & 12 have better dtrace support so this will aid solving problems.

I'd like to close this ticket.
